import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'D:/Projects/claude-code/mcp_servers/google_maps'\)
import server

async def test\(\):
    tools = await server.list_tools\(\)
    print\(f'Tools available: {len\(tools\)}'\)
    for tool in tools:
        print\(f'  - {tool.name}: {tool.description}'\)
    print\('SUCCESS'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")
